app.name: RuangTeduh
app.tagline: A safe space for your feelings
app.description: A safe and calming emotional support platform to share feelings, chat with an AI companion, and connect with a supportive community.

hero.title: You are not alone
hero.subtitle: RuangTeduh is a safe space to share your feelings, talk with an empathetic AI companion, and connect with a supportive community — without fear of judgment.

features.title: Features that support your mental health

aiChat.title: Empathetic AI Companion
aiChat.description: Share your feelings anytime. Our AI companion will listen without judgment and provide emotional support.

moodTracker.title: Track Your Mood
moodTracker.description: Record your feelings daily and see your mood patterns over time.

community.title: Anonymous Community
community.description: Share stories and support each other in a safe, anonymous community.

safe.title: Safe & Private
safe.description: Your privacy is our priority. All data is encrypted and your identity stays anonymous.

trust.title: Designed with empathy
trust.description: RuangTeduh is built by people who care about mental health. We believe everyone deserves a safe space to express their feelings.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your safe space

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join our supportive community
register.verificationSentSubtitle: Registration successful. We have sent a confirmation email to {email}. Please check your inbox and click the verification link before logging in.

verified.title: Email Successfully Verified! 🌱
verified.subtitle: Thank you for verifying your account. You are now ready to begin your peaceful journey in RuangTeduh.
verified.success: Your account is now active and secure.

welcome.title: Welcome to RuangTeduh 🌿
welcome.subtitle: Before we begin, let's get to know you!

username.title: Choose an anonymous name
username.subtitle: This name will be visible to the community. You can change it anytime.
username.hint: Choose a name that makes you comfortable

avatar.title: Choose your emoji avatar
avatar.subtitle: Express yourself with your favorite emoji

complete.title: You're all set! 🎉
complete.subtitle: RuangTeduh is ready to accompany you. Remember, you are not alone.

quickActions.title: What would you like to do?

recentMood.title: Recent Moods
recentMood.empty: No moods recorded yet. Start tracking your feelings!

banner.title: Feeling Anxious or Tired?
banner.description: Take a moment to calm your mind with guided breathing and soothing natural sounds.

sessions.title: Chat History
sessions.empty: No conversations yet. Start a new chat!

welcome.title: Hello! 👋
welcome.message: I'm here to listen. Share anything you're feeling — I won't judge.
suggestions: I need someone to talk to
I'm feeling anxious and don't know what to do

safety.title: We Care About Your Safety ❤️
safety.message: It sounds like you're going through a very difficult time. You are not alone, and professional help is available.

mood.title: Track Mood
mood.notePlaceholder: Tell us more about how you're feeling...

history.title: Mood History
history.empty: No mood history yet. Start tracking your feelings daily! 🌱

community.title: Community
community.empty: No posts yet. Be the first to share! 💬
community.emptyComments: No comments yet. Show your support! 🤗
community.guideline: Remember: We're here to support each other. Let's keep this space safe and positive. 💛

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All data will be permanently deleted.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

journal.title: Journal & Diary
journal.subtitle: A private space to express your thoughts and reflect on yourself.
journal.searchPlaceholder: Search journals by title or content...

empty.title: Your journal is empty
empty.description: Journaling can help relieve anxiety and understand your feelings. Start writing your first entry today! 🌱

form.titlePlaceholder: Give a title for your story today...
form.contentPlaceholder: Pour all your thoughts, feelings, or events of today freely here...

guestWarning.title: Guest Mode Active ⚠️
guestWarning.message: Your journals are only saved locally in this browser since you are logged in as a Guest. If you clear browser cache, your journals will be lost. Please register or login to save your journals permanently in the cloud.

journal.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this journal entry?

calming.title: Calming & Relaxation Space
calming.subtitle: Take a deep breath, release tension, and let yourself relax for a moment.

sounds.title: Calming Soundscapes
sounds.description: Customize your ambient sound mix below to help you drift into relaxation.

general.title: Nothing here yet
general.description: But that's okay, all good things take time to begin 🌱
